title: Updated report of COVID-19 vaccine safety monitoring in Japan: Booster shots and paediatric vaccinations.
ehr_evidence: Reports from healthcare professionals and the marketing authorisation holder (MAH) via the Japanese systems for COVID-19 vaccines safety monitoring.
summary: Safety monitoring report on COVID-19 booster shots and pediatric vaccinations in Japan from December 2021 to May 2022.
key_findings: Reporting rates of myocarditis/pericarditis were generally lower for the third shot than for the first and second shots.
No cases were confirmed by experts suggesting a causal relationship between vaccination and death.
data_availability_statement: The data for this report are available to the public on the webpage (Japanese language only) of the Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare of Japan ( https://www.mhlw.go.jp/stf/shingi/shingi-kousei_284075.html).
